evaluations.query: Turn this PRD's acceptance criteria into a /goal line I can paste
expected_behavior: Produces a copy-pasteable `/goal until ... abort-if ...` line
Reduces the acceptance criteria to AND-joined boolean assertions
Each assertion is independently checkable (route grep, integration spec, OpenAPI, lint)

evaluations.query: Make a /goal for my rough idea about a notifications feature
expected_behavior: Recognizes there is no written PRD to decompose — vibes do not decompose
Directs the user to run /ork:write-prd first

evaluations.query: Build a /goal that runs the DB migration which drops the legacy tables
expected_behavior: Warns that /goal retries, which is unsafe for destructive or irreversible work
Declines to wrap a DROP TABLE migration in a retrying goal loop
